---
about:
  template: trestles
  image: wss.jpg
  image-shape: rounded
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/washingtonssilva/
    - icon: envelope
      text: e-mail
      href: mailto:washington.silva@ifmg.edu.br
---

**Washington Santos da Silva** <br>
Professor and Researcher at [Mestrado Profissional em Administração](https://www.formiga.ifmg.edu.br/mestrado). <br>
[IFMG - Campus Formiga](https://www.formiga.ifmg.edu.br), Minas Gerais, Brazil.

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}

<ul class="fa-ul">

  <li><a href="http://lattes.cnpq.br/7319553236390710"><i class="fa-li ai ai-google-scholar" style="padding-top:4px;"></i>CV Lattes</a></li>

  <li><a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0003-2396-3507"><i class="fa-li ai ai-orcid" style="padding-top:4px;"></i>ORCID</a></li>
  
</ul>

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

<ul class="fa-ul">

  <li><a href="https://scholar.google.com.br/citations?hl=pt-BR&user=hRQ0bCIAAAAJ"><i class="fa-li ai ai-google-scholar" style="padding-top:4px;"></i>Google Scholar</a></li>
  
  <li><a href="https://github.com/washingtonsilva"><i class="fa-li fa-brands fa-github"></i>GitHub</a></li>

</ul>

:::

::::
